TABLE.NAME: exelearning
TABLE.COMMENT: Each record is one mod_exelearning activity instance.

FIELD.NAME: entrypath
FIELD.COMMENT: Path of the package entry file.

FIELD.NAME: entryname
FIELD.COMMENT: Filename of the package entry.

FIELD.NAME: revision
FIELD.COMMENT: Incremented on each file change to bust caches.

FIELD.NAME: grademax
FIELD.COMMENT: Max score per gradable iDevice (default 100).

FIELD.NAME: gradepass
FIELD.COMMENT: Overall grade required to pass (DEC-0010). 0 disables pass-based completion. Mirrors db/upgrade.php stage 5 (2026052804) for fresh installs.

FIELD.NAME: gradedisplaytype
FIELD.COMMENT: GRADE_DISPLAY_TYPE_* constant; 0=DEFAULT (inherit course), 1=REAL, 2=PERCENTAGE, 3=LETTER, 12=REAL_PERCENTAGE.

FIELD.NAME: grademethod
FIELD.COMMENT: Attempt aggregation for the gradebook: 0=highest, 1=average, 2=first, 3=last, 4=lowest (DEC-0007).

FIELD.NAME: grademodel
FIELD.COMMENT: Gradebook columns model (DEC-0008, rev. 2026-05-29): 0=overall only, 1=per-iDevice only (default). The legacy 'both' (2) was removed.

FIELD.NAME: gradeenabled
FIELD.COMMENT: Master grading switch (DEC-0029): 1=activity is graded (detect iDevices, gradebook columns, reports); 0=not graded (no grade items, no reports, behaves like a plain resource).

FIELD.NAME: maxattempt
FIELD.COMMENT: Max attempts per user (DEC-0007 phase 2): 0=unlimited.

FIELD.NAME: reviewmode
FIELD.COMMENT: Student attempt review (DEC-0007 phase 2): 0=never, 1=always, 2=after completion.

FIELD.NAME: teachermodevisible
FIELD.COMMENT: If 1, show eXeLearning's in-package teacher-mode toggle (#teacher-mode-toggler-wrapper); if 0 (default) inject CSS to hide it (mod_exeweb parity).

FIELD.NAME: gradesyncrev
FIELD.COMMENT: Highest package revision already scanned for gradable iDevices. Gates the view.php self-heal so content-only packages (0 gradable iDevices) are not fully re-extracted/re-parsed on every page view.

TABLE.NAME: exelearning_grade_item
TABLE.COMMENT: Maps one gradable iDevice detected in the ELPX package to a Moodle grade_item itemnumber.

FIELD.NAME: itemnumber
FIELD.COMMENT: Stable across re-uploads. Monotonic per activity.

FIELD.NAME: objectid
FIELD.COMMENT: Stable iDevice id from content.xml (e.g. idevice-1779989968114-sevb8qqdy or yyyymmddhhmmssXXXXXX).

FIELD.NAME: pageid
FIELD.COMMENT: Page id (UUID v4 or yyyymmddhhmmssXXXXXX) the iDevice belongs to.

FIELD.NAME: idevicetype
FIELD.COMMENT: odeIdeviceTypeName, e.g. trueorfalse, guess, dragdrop.

FIELD.NAME: name
FIELD.COMMENT: Display name for the gradebook column.

FIELD.NAME: deleted
FIELD.COMMENT: Set to 1 when the iDevice disappears in a re-upload (preserves grade history).

FIELD.NAME: contenthash
FIELD.COMMENT: sha1 of the iDevice content block in content.xml. Detects an in-place options edit (same objectid, changed scoring) so the teacher can be warned that existing grades are now stale.

TABLE.NAME: exelearning_attempt
TABLE.COMMENT: One row per user submission per gradable item. Keeps attempt history (DEC-0007), mirroring mod_h5pactivity/mod_scorm.

FIELD.NAME: attempt
FIELD.COMMENT: 1-based attempt number per user and activity.

FIELD.NAME: itemnumber
FIELD.COMMENT: 0=overall aggregated, >0=gradable iDevice (matches exelearning_grade_item.itemnumber).

FIELD.NAME: scaledscore
FIELD.COMMENT: rawscore/maxscore in 0..1.

FIELD.NAME: sessiontoken
FIELD.COMMENT: Per page-load token so multiple auto-commits map to the same attempt.

TABLE.NAME: exelearning_migration
TABLE.COMMENT: Audit/idempotency map of activities migrated from mod_exeweb/mod_exescorm into mod_exelearning (issue #13 #3, DEC-0026).

FIELD.NAME: sourcecomponent
FIELD.COMMENT: Frankenstyle of the source module, e.g. mod_exeweb or mod_exescorm.

FIELD.NAME: sourcecmid
FIELD.COMMENT: Course module id of the migrated source activity.

FIELD.NAME: targetcmid
FIELD.COMMENT: Course module id of the created eXeLearning activity.
